"}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#6F42C1","--shiki-dark":"#B392F0"},"children":"indexWorkspace"}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#24292E","--shiki-dark":"#E1E4E8"},"children":"(root),"}]]}],"\n",["$","span",null,{"className":"line","children":[["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#24292E","--shiki-dark":"#E1E4E8"},"children":" "}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#005CC5","--shiki-dark":"#79B8FF"},"children":"true"}]]}],"\n",["$","span",null,{"className":"line","children":["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#24292E","--shiki-dark":"#E1E4E8"},"children":"})"}]}],"\n",["$","span",null,{"className":"line"}],"\n",["$","span",null,{"className":"line","children":[["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#D73A49","--shiki-dark":"#F97583"},"children":"yield*"}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#24292E","--shiki-dark":"#E1E4E8"},"children":" Jobs."}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#6F42C1","--shiki-dark":"#B392F0"},"children":"cancel"}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#24292E","--shiki-dark":"#E1E4E8"},"children":"(job.id)"}]]}]]}]}]}]}]
13:[["$","meta","0",{"charSet":"utf-8"}],["$","meta","1",{"name":"viewport","content":"width=device-width, initial-scale=1"}]]
